questions.question: Explain the difference between a unigram and a bigram in the context of N-gram models. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the differences in the number of n-grams and their usage in language modeling.

questions.question: Describe the Paninion Framework and its significance in the context of language modeling. How does it contribute to better language modeling?
questions.hint: Focus on the key components and applications of the Paninion Framework.

questions.question: What is Karaka theory, and how does it relate to language modeling? Provide an example to demonstrate its application.
questions.hint: Focus on the key concepts and real-world applications of Karaka theory in language modeling.
